positive: A detailed mandala design featuring intertwining bioluminescent flora and celestial bodies. The composition must be centrally symmetrical and highly stylized, suitable for a repeating textile pattern or a single apparel chest print. Incorporate geometric Islamic art patterns with organic elements like stylized monstera leaves, crescent moons, and abstract constellations. Use a palette of deep indigo, muted emerald green, glowing gold, and soft lavender. The line work must be clean, crisp, and bold, maximizing negative space for high contrast. Style: Art Nouveau meets Celestial Mandala, Vector illustration aesthetic, perfect symmetry, high resolution, ink drawing on a dark background.
negative: blur, smudge, dirty, messy, low resolution, grain, grainy, artifacts, watermark, signature, text, logo, username, extra limbs, poorly drawn, bad anatomy, distorted, noise, jpeg artifacts
